fields.label: Claude Code
fields.description: Install hooks into ~/.claude/settings.json to track Claude Code session state (Working / Waiting / Idle / Error).

fields.label: Codex CLI
fields.description: Enable official Codex hooks by setting features.codex_hooks in ~/.codex/config.toml and installing command hooks in ~/.codex/hooks.json for Working / Idle / Error tracking.

fields.label: Alert on state change
fields.description: Play a cue when an agent starts working, needs your input, or finishes a task. Also expands the Agents Status island briefly on completion.

fields.label: Sound pack
fields.description: Which bundled sound pack to use for start / needs-input / task-complete cues.
